biomarker_category.description: acceptable value for biomarker categories in colon cancer. If not included in these standard categories, should be classified as others.
biomarker_category.title: Biomarker Category

biomarker_name.description: specify the name of the biomarker here.
biomarker_name.title: Biomarker Name

expression.description: specify whether or not the biomarker is expressed here.For Her-2 please refer to the score field, and don't fill in this field.
expression.title: Expression

percentage.description: the percentage of tumor cells showing positive expression of the biomarker, rounded to integer. if not specified, return null
percentage.title: Percentage

score.description: specify the Her-2 expression score, negative: score 0 or 1, equivocal: score 2, positive: score 3 of the biomarker here, if applicable.
score.title: Score

lymph_node_category.description: acceptable value for lymph node categories in colon cancer. If not included in these standard lymph node 'station' number, should be classified as others.
lymph_node_category.title: Lymph Node Category

station_name.description: specify the name of the lymph node group/station here.
station_name.title: Station Name

distance.description: If margin is involved, return 0. If margin is uninvolved/free, try your best to find the distance at both microscopic and macroscopic(gross) description, and specify the distance from tumor to margin in mm, rounded to integer. If the margin is uninvolved/free and, after your best effort, the distance is still not specified, return null
distance.title: Distance

margin_category.description: acceptable value for surgical margins in colon cancer. If not included in these standard margins, should be classified as others.
margin_category.title: Margin Category

description: Canonical extracted case record for colorectal cancer. Built dynamically from the DSPy signatures listed in models.modellist.organmodels['colorectal'].

ajcc_version.description: identify the ajcc version of the pathological staging
ajcc_version.title: Ajcc Version

biomarkers.description: return all of the examined immunoreceptors using immunohistochemistry techniques,like mlh1, msh2, etc. in JSON format. example:{"MSH6": {"expression": true,"percentage": 90}, "PMS2": {"expression": true, "percentage": 100}},"mlh1": {"expression": true, "percentage": 100}}.
biomarkers.title: Biomarkers

cancer_primary_site.description: identify the primary site of cancer. e.g. sigmoid colon
cancer_primary_site.title: Cancer Primary Site

distant_metastasis.description: check whether or not distant metastasis is present
distant_metastasis.title: Distant Metastasis

extracellular_mucin.description: check whether or not extracellular mucin is present
extracellular_mucin.title: Extracellular Mucin

extranodal_extension.description: check whether or not extranodal extension is present; if no lymph node metastasis, should be None
extranodal_extension.title: Extranodal Extension

grade.description: identify the grade of the cancer, well->1, moderate->2, poor->3, undiff-4
grade.title: Grade

histology.description: identify the histological type of the cancer. e.g. adenocarcinoma, if not in the list, classify as others
histology.title: Histology

lymphovascular_invasion.description: check whether or not lymphovascular invasion is present
lymphovascular_invasion.title: Lymphovascular Invasion

margins.description: return all of the possible involved margins and its distance from cancer. example:[{"margin_category": "proximal", "margin_involved": true, "distance": 5}, {"margin_category": "distal", "margin_involved": false, "distance": null}, {"margin_category": "mesenteric", "margin_involved": false, "distance": null}]. If not present, just output null for every margin
margins.title: Margins

maximal_ln_size.description: check the maximal size of node metastatic tumor in mm, rounded to integer; if no lymph node metastasis, should be None
maximal_ln_size.title: Maximal Ln Size

perineural_invasion.description: check whether or not perineural invasion is present
perineural_invasion.title: Perineural Invasion

pm_category.description: identify the pm category of the tumor. if you see cM0 or cM1, etc., code as mx, since pathological M category is not available
pm_category.title: Pm Category

pn_category.description: identify the pn category of the tumor
pn_category.title: Pn Category

procedure.description: identify which surgery procedure was used. e.g. polypectomy
procedure.title: Procedure

pt_category.description: identify the pt category of the tumor
pt_category.title: Pt Category

regional_lymph_node.description: return all of the involved regional lymph node. example:[{"lymph_node_category": "regional", "involved": 2, "examined": 5}, {"lymph_node_category": "mesenteric", "involved": 0, "examined": 3}]. If not present, just output null for every lymph node
regional_lymph_node.title: Regional Lymph Node

signet_ring.description: check whether or not signet ring cell is present
signet_ring.title: Signet Ring

stage_group.description: identify the stage group of the tumor
stage_group.title: Stage Group

surgical_technique.description: identify how the surgery was taken. e.g. laparoscopic
surgical_technique.title: Surgical Technique

tnm_descriptor.description: identify the tnm descriptor of the tumor. e.g., "y" means post-therapy, "m" means multiple primary tumor, "r" means recurrent tumor, code this if the report explicitly mean this, dont guess
tnm_descriptor.title: Tnm Descriptor

treatment_effect.description: check the treatment effect of the cancer. If you see "No known presurgical therapy", return None
treatment_effect.title: Treatment Effect

tumor_budding.description: identify the number of tumor budding of the cancer.low->0, moderate->1, high->2
tumor_budding.title: Tumor Budding

tumor_invasion.description: identify the part invasioned by tumor, e.g lamina propria
tumor_invasion.title: Tumor Invasion

type_of_polyp.description: identify the type of polyp of the tumor
type_of_polyp.title: Type Of Polyp

title: ColorectalCancerCase
